calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Off Calendar

Motion Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3788.

Martin M. Eisenberg, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Helen Dang, who was placed under oath and testified.
Tuan Tran, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendants Nelson Liao, an individual, a/k/a Terchi Nelson Liao, or Escrow Control Company, a dissolved California corporation.
Plaintiffs' complaint to Quiet Title was filed on June 12, 2017.
Order for Publication of Summons & Complaint as to defendant Nelson Liao, an individual, a/k/a Terchi Nelson Liao, was filed on August 10, 2017.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Complaint as to defendant Nelson Liao, an individual, a/k/a Terchi Nelson Liao, was filed on March 6, 2018.
Proof of Service of Summons & Complaint as to defendant Escrow Crotrol Company, a dissolved California corporation, was filed on March 6, 2018.
Defaults as to defendants Nelson Liao, an individual, a/k/a Terchi Nelson Liao, and Escrow Control Company, a dissolved California corporation, were entered on March 6, 2018.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 23, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

The deed of trust dated June 15, 2006, executed by and on behalf of Pengasus, Inc., as Trustor, to Escrow Control Company, a California corporation, as Trustee, and naming Nelson Liao as beneficiary, describing the property situated at 219 Brannan Street, Unit A, San Francisco, California, assigned Lot Number 518 in Block 3789, which deed of trust was recoreded in the official records of the County of San Francisco, California on June 16, 2006, is declared void, set aside and fully reconveyed and neither created nor now creates any rights, claims, beneficial interest, lien, or other title or interest in the real property described upon said deed of trust in favor of Nelson Liao, also know as Terchi Nelson Liao, nor in favor of Escrow Control Company, a dissolved California Coroporation.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
